summary: Iteration 28 regression smoke-test — 100% GREEN. All 9 review scenarios verified against the preview env (https://portal-straight-line.preview.emergentagent.com). Backend: 6/6 pytest cases pass (branding returns 200 with logo_light+logo_dark both starting with 'data:image/webp;base64,' — 131 KB and 272 KB payloads, NOT the old text SVG; sitemap.xml returns 200 application/xml with ' previews, the light card shows the blue Di+wordmark on white directly (no invert filter), the dark card shows the same blue Di+wordmark artwork on a dark background — matches the bundled logo_dark.webp default described in review. Zero regressions detected.
critical_code_review_comments: Header.jsx / Footer.jsx use h-16 md:h-20 (=64px/80px) inside a header container of h-[96px] — measured logo bounding box is exactly 80px on 1440-desktop, so no vertical clipping. OK.

backend/portal/branding.py file-based defaults are working: /api/portal/branding returns 131 KB (light) and 272 KB (dark) WebP payloads. Response is not gzipped by the reverse proxy (payload is base64 already) — a future optimisation could stream them as separate /api/portal/branding/logo_light.webp binary endpoints with proper Cache-Control immutable headers so the 400 KB JSON blob doesn't have to be re-fetched by useBranding on every page.
useBranding hook is not exercised in this smoke — but the DOM proves the module-cache is working (single fetch per SPA session). Left unchanged.
NotFound.jsx correctly OVERRIDES an existing <meta name=robots> in-place and restores prev value on unmount — good SEO hygiene. Zero issues.
install.sh / update.sh weren't retested this iteration — iteration_27 CRITICAL issue about 'git stash on dirty tree' silently reverting new commits is still open in main-agent's plate.
AdminBranding preview tags for logo_dark are rendered on top of a #061b3a-ish dark card so the on-dark artwork variant renders correctly — no CSS overrides needed.
seed_data_creation: None. Test suite reads existing branding, sitemap, invoice list, and PDF preview — no writes.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Regression file /app/backend/tests/test_iter28_regression_smoke.py covers the 6 backend items (branding webp data URIs, sitemap.xml, admin login token, invoice PDF preview 130px logo). Run with `python -m pytest backend/tests/test_iter28_regression_smoke.py -v -o 'addopts='` (~1s). Frontend scenarios were verified once via Playwright — key testids to re-use next iteration: site-logo-img (80px h-20), not-found-page + not-found-home-btn, nav-home (href='/#home'), inv-pdf-* on /portal/admin/invoices, admin-branding-card-logo_{light,dark} + admin-branding-preview-logo_{light,dark} on /portal/admin/branding. Iteration_27 CRITICAL — scripts/update.sh stashes dirty tree — is NOT retested here and remains in main-agent's queue.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found. All 9 review scenarios pass on first run against the preview env.
